subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer in the desert and wilderness of the love of God! Should Tabriz be in tumult and Ardibíl partake of the wine of tribulations and woes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته دشت و صحرا محبه الله اگر تبریز تبخیز بود و اردبیل از باده بلایا و محن جامی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
